and which is being dis
cussed by the council this afternoon excellent It will
if adopted, end the fight between the l. W. w. and the
police The Press not only believing in free speech BUT
INSISTING STRENUOUSLY ON IT'S IMPARTIAL
OBSERVANCE IN SPOKANE thinks that the ordinance
should be adopted at once.


The proposed ordinance is in effect in Seattle Chicago
and New York Each of these cities has had it's troubles
over the free speech question: because of the attitude
police officials, and each has, result, LOCALLY
recognized the right it is NATIONALLY recognized
IN the constitution of the United States.


The ordinance allows street speaking at any place
any time Of the day., WITH THE EXCEPTION OF Be
TWEEN THE HOURS OF AND P NJ, when traffic
flowing out from the business district at it's height The
provision also made and insisted upon that the speakers
give hours notice to the police in order that they may
make preparations to insure order and prevent possible
disorder.


This is the law in Seattle Why should it not be the
law in Spokane! Spokane is part of the United States
and is not only foolish but it is against the federal laws
to oppose free Speech Judges here and elsewhere
decided.



Pass ordinance permitting but regulating street
speaking, and the trouble will be There be
other fair and equitable action by the city government
